intent_tree: {"编写一个Python程序用于选择和分析MP3文件的音频质量": {"选择MP3文件": {}, "检测音频时长": {}, "检查音频清晰度": {"基于平均音量判断清晰度": {}, "基于静音段数量判断清晰度": {}}, "提供清晰度反馈和建议": {}}}
task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "弹出文件选择对话框，让用户选择MP3文件"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "读取选定的MP3文件并加载为AudioSegment对象"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "计算音频文件的总时长"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "将音频转换为numpy数组以进行进一步分析"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "计算音频的平均音量（dBFS）"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "检测音频中的静音段数量"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "根据平均音量判断音频是否清晰"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "根据静音段数量判断音频是否清晰"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "生成清晰度反馈信息并给出建议"}, {"id": "Node10", "description": "显示音频时长、清晰度结果及建议"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node2", "type": "fileSelection"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node3", "type": "durationCalculation"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node4", "type": "audioConversion"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node5", "type": "volumeAnalysis"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node6", "type": "silenceDetection"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node7", "type": "clarityJudgmentByVolume"}, {"source": "Node6", "target": "Node8", "type": "clarityJudgmentBySilence"}, {"source": "Node7", "target": "Node9", "type": "feedbackGeneration"}, {"source": "Node8", "target": "Node9", "type": "feedbackGeneration"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node10", "type": "displayDuration"}, {"source": "Node9", "target": "Node10", "type": "displayFeedback"}]}
